text: I thought I would be satisfied ordering a product from this brand
Very happy with this t-shirt however the delivery was too slow
You can't advertise a product as "one size fits all" when it is so small
Probably the best trousers I have ever bought. Super comfortable and very light.
The product is clearly not the same as on the website. I thought it was yellow but it looks brown in real. Very disappointing.

I think it would be useful to specify that the product is sent from China so that we can expect delay in the delivery. Other than that, I am very pleased. It is really good quality with comfortable material.
I love the color on this dress. Very original.
Oh great! Another brand that claims to be environmental friendly but uses all kind of wonderful products toxic for the planet
I was so excited when I ordered this hat. What a disappointment when I found out it was way too big.
Oh great, another item that fell apart after one day. Truly exceptional quality.
What a wonderful black colour for these trousers and it’s evolving because after washing wash it once it became grey
Nothing is positive with this shirt: quality is not good, material is not comfortable, color is not even nice
Absolutely stunning craftsmanship. The zipper broke on day one and the seams unravelled by day three. Five stars for the creative interpretation of quality control.
Wow, what incredible sizing. I ordered a medium and received what I can only describe as a small tent. Clearly labeled though, so at least they got that right.
Just what I needed: a jacket that looks nothing like the photos, arrived three weeks late, and smells like it was stored in a basement. Truly a premium experience.
The design is genuinely beautiful and I get compliments every time I wear it. That said, after two washes the colour has already started to fade, which at this price point is unacceptable.
Delivery was fast and the packaging was lovely. The shoes themselves are unfortunately too narrow for normal feet and I had to return them.
I wouldn’t say this is a bad product, but I wouldn’t say it’s good either. It does the job without being anything special.
Terrible product. Cheap plastic buttons, thin fabric, and it shrunk massively after the first wash. Complete waste of money.
Exactly as described, arrived quickly, and the fit is perfect. I’ve already ordered two more in different colours.
